diffs.diff:
--- a/setup_best.py
+++ b/setup_best.py
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+import os, shutil

+os.makedirs('checkpoints/best_ensemble', exist_ok=True)

+for i in [0,1,2]:

+    src = f'checkpoints/ensemble/seed{i}.pt'

+    dst = f'checkpoints/best_ensemble/seed{i}.pt'

+    if not os.path.exists(dst):

+        shutil.copy(src, dst)

+    print(src, '->', dst)

+print(sorted(os.listdir('checkpoints/best_ensemble')))
